name: test_vaccination_file_upload_systmone_historic_invalid_data
description:
Test: Upload a SystmOne historic vaccination records file with invalid data and
   verify error handling.
Steps:
1. Navigate to vaccination records import page.
2. Upload a SystmOne historic file with invalid data.
Verification:
- Output lists errors as expected for each record
Scenarios covered:
EmptyDoB, InvalidDoB, LongerNHSNo, ShorterNHSNo, InvalidVaccsType, InvalidVaccsDose,
InvalidVaccsType, EmptyFirstName, EmptyPostcode, InvalidPostcode, EmptySex,
InvalidSex, EmptyLastName, EmptyEventDate, InvalidEventDate, FutureEventDate,
PastEventDate, InvalidEventTime, InvalidSchoolURN
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a SystmOne historic vaccination records file with invalid data and
verify error handling.
Steps:

  1. Navigate to vaccination records import page.
  2. Upload a SystmOne historic file with invalid data.
    Verification:
  • Output lists errors as expected for each record
    Scenarios covered:
    EmptyDoB, InvalidDoB, LongerNHSNo, ShorterNHSNo, InvalidVaccsType, InvalidVaccsDose,
    InvalidVaccsType, EmptyFirstName, EmptyPostcode, InvalidPostcode, EmptySex,
    InvalidSex, EmptyLastName, EmptyEventDate, InvalidEventDate, FutureEventDate,
    PastEventDate, InvalidEventTime, InvalidSchoolURN

Steps: 1. Navigate to vaccination records import page. 2. Upload a SystmOne historic file with invalid data. Verification: - Output lists errors as expected for each record Scenarios covered: EmptyDoB, InvalidDoB, LongerNHSNo, ShorterNHSNo, InvalidVaccsType, InvalidVaccsDose, InvalidVaccsType, testStage.description:
Test: Upload a SystmOne historic vaccination records file with invalid data and
   verify error handling.
Steps:
1. Navigate to vaccination records import page.
2. Upload a SystmOne historic file with invalid data.
Verification:
- Output lists errors as expected for each record
Scenarios covered:
EmptyDoB, InvalidDoB, LongerNHSNo, ShorterNHSNo, InvalidVaccsType, InvalidVaccsDose,
InvalidVaccsType, EmptyFirstName, EmptyPostcode, InvalidPostcode, EmptySex,
InvalidSex, EmptyLastName, EmptyEventDate, InvalidEventDate, FutureEventDate,
PastEventDate, InvalidEventTime, InvalidSchoolURN
